nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or incorrect for software tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for productivity purposes and to research. For productivity, I will ask AI how to perform certain tasks in Excel

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or refusing to compile information
nodes.grounding_span: For research, I will use AI to compile list of prospects, but I have seen challenges

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unaware of user's goals
nodes.grounding_span: I feel it is important that the AI understand what my goal is so that it can best help with my goals

nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.label_negative: AI for fully automated email sending
nodes.grounding_span: I might ask for suggestions on how to phrase certain emails and then I will evaluate its suggestions and use its final copy or drafts as inspiration

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if the tip is correct and works for me, then I will incorporate the suggestion

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for productivity purposes

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: if the tip is correct and works for me, then I will incorporate the suggestion

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I trust it to send information to customers yet

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in complex Excel tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if the tip is correct and works for me, then I will incorporate the suggestion

nodes.label: Frustration with AI refusing to compile lists
nodes.grounding_span: It is frustrating when the AI punts on a requests

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I trust it to send information to customers yet

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I am hoping that AI evolves so that it can assist me with productivity

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and testing
nodes.grounding_span: I will test the suggestion on dummy files to see if I am getting the correct information

nodes.label: Goal-sharing and context provision
nodes.grounding_span: I might share with the AI what my ultimate goal is with the 'final column'
